title: Measure Ruler: Persist and Share Pinned Rulers

chart.options: chart: { id: 'measure-persist', type: 'line', height: 380, fontFamily: 'Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif', animations: { enabled: true }, measure: { enabled: true, pinOnRelease: true }, history: { enabled: true }, toolbar: { show: true, tools: { zoom: true, pan: true, reset: true, download: false } }, zoom: { enabled: true, type: 'x' }, }, stroke: { width: 2, curve: 'straight' }, colors: ['#0ea5e9'], dataLabels: { enabled: false }, title: { text: 'Revenue (draw rulers, then share or undo)', align: 'left' }, xaxis: { type: 'numeric', title: { text: 'Session' } }, yaxis: { title: { text: 'Revenue' }, decimalsInFloat: 0 },
